user.title: Add Sesame BLE Lock
user.description: Select your Sesame device from the discovered list.

secret.title: SK Key
secret.description: Paste the full SK value from the Sesame QR code URL for: {device}

data.secret_key: SK value (base64 string from QR code)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check that it is in range.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Make sure the device is nearby and powered on.
error.invalid_sk: Invalid SK value. Make sure to copy the full 'sk' parameter from the QR code URL.
error.scan_failed: Bluetooth scan failed. Check your Bluetooth adapter.

abort.no_devices_found: No Sesame devices found. Make sure your lock is nearby and has Bluetooth enabled.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a supported Sesame model.
abort.not_registered: This device has not been set up. Please configure it using the official Sesame app first.
